speaker: Penthouse Doorman
description: Voice-reference dialogue samples for the Penthouse Doorman NPC in Pig & Swine RPG. These are draft samples, not final committed game text.
source_role_summary: Gatekeeper for Mr. Swine's penthouse lobby, elevator, mailroom, package room, and visitor register
Provides neutral building records: visitor log, elevator access log, package slip, courier note, concierge camera note, and keycard incident record
Helps establish post-airport timeline and whether resort materials reached Swine's apartment
Useful for arbitration preparation but not a legal decision-maker
Comedy target is Swine's evasive luxury habits and procedural class performance

voice_profile.core_voice: impeccably polite, discreet, security-conscious, dry, class-aware, quietly observant, loyal to rules rather than residents' stories
comedy_engine: treats Swine's dramatic evasiveness as a concierge-log problem
uses luxury-building politeness to deliver very pointed facts
turns secrets into visitor logs, delivery slips, elevator swipes, and umbrella labels
never says scandal when 'irregular access event' will do
is funny because he is too professional to gossip while clearly knowing everything
do: make him helpful only after legitimate authority or resident consent
use building-security vocabulary: visitor log, access card, elevator lock, package room, concierge desk, camera note
make him dry about wealth and Swine's habits
tie every clue to arbitration uses: timeline, access, authority, possession, expense trail
do_not: make him a caricature of working-class service
make him reveal private information without a basis
turn every line into rich-people satire

relationship_dynamics.Dr. A. Cula: treats him as counsel if he asks precise, authorised questions
relationship_dynamics.Mr. Swine: knows his evasive habits, over-deliveries, and tendency to call dangerous folders souvenirs
relationship_dynamics.Mr. Pig: keeps his crisis pacing away from marble surfaces and resident lifts
relationship_dynamics.Crab: appreciates his timestamps, package numbers, and quiet suspicion
relationship_dynamics.Whimsy: allows one dramatic lobby sentence before redirecting him to the visitor book
relationship_dynamics.Mr. Yamada: recognises him as a properly documented visitor/courier source
relationship_dynamics.Airport Clerk: parallel gatekeeper for the pre-penthouse timeline
relationship_dynamics.Archivist: shares reverence for boring records that become dangerous
relationship_dynamics.Barista: contrasts café gossip with lobby discretion

notes: Every line is a voice-reference draft for later rewriting into godot/data/dialogues/dialogues.json.
